notes: Don't work with Proton, but with Steam direct on Wine (Windows Version) the game works perfectly.
title: Carcassonne - Tiles & Tactics

notes:
Out of the box the game crashes, but with these tweaks works correctly:
 -->  PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%
title: Carcassonne - Tiles & Tactics

notes: Game runs fine however performance isn't that good for a 2D game, alt-tabbing will cause the game to turn to a black screen and this cannot be recovered, the game needs to be killed and restarted.  Tested on two different laptops with Intel HD620 gpus
title: Carcassonne - Tiles & Tactics

notes:
It runs perfectly (online and offline) with the parameter PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command% 
It crashes without it. First time takes a lot of time to start (Installing components?)
title: Carcassonne - Tiles & Tactics
